PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\Services.ps1", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $utf8bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $true; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\Services.ps1", $content, $utf8bom\); $errors = $null; $null = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\Services.ps1", [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\); if \($errors.Count -eq 0\) { "OK" } else { "ОШИБКИ:"; $errors | ForEach-Object { "  Line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\): $\($_.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($utf8bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $true; foreach \($f in @\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\ServiceLists.ps1", "C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\Services.ps1"\)\) { $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($f, $content, $utf8bom\); $errors = $null; $null = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\($f, [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\); if \($errors.Count -eq 0\) { "$\([System.IO.Path]::GetFileName\($f\)\) — OK" } else { "$\([System.IO.Path]::GetFileName\($f\)\) — ОШИБКИ:"; $errors | ForEach-Object { "  Line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\): $\($_.Message\)" } } })

PowerShell($netServices = @\('WlanSvc','NcbService','Wcmsvc','netprofm','NlaSvc','Netman','nsi','Dhcp','BFE','EventSystem','iphlpsvc','DusmSvc','CDPSvc','NetworkSetupSvc','NetSetupSvc','vwififlt'\); foreach \($s in $netServices\) { $svc = Get-Service -Name $s -EA SilentlyContinue; if \($svc\) { $reg = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\$s" -Name Start -EA SilentlyContinue\).Start; $startLabel = switch\($reg\) { 2 {"Auto"} 3 {"Manual"} 4 {"Disabled"} default {"$reg"} }; "$\($svc.Status.ToString\(\).PadRight\(10\)\) \($startLabel\)`t$s - $\($svc.DisplayName\)" } })

PowerShell(sc.exe qc WlanSvc | Select-String "DEPEND"; sc.exe qc Wcmsvc | Select-String "DEPEND"; "---"; $deps = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\Wcmsvc" -Name DependOnService -EA SilentlyContinue\).DependOnService; "Wcmsvc depends on: $\($deps -join ', '\)"; $deps2 = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\WlanSvc" -Name DependOnService -EA SilentlyContinue\).DependOnService; "WlanSvc depends on: $\($deps2 -join ', '\)"; foreach \($d in \($deps + $deps2 | Select-Object -Unique\)\) { $s = Get-Service $d -EA SilentlyContinue; if \($s\) { $reg = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\$d" -Name Start -EA SilentlyContinue\).Start; "$\($s.Status.ToString\(\).PadRight\(10\)\) \(Start=$reg\)`t$d" } })

PowerShell($regPath = "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\WinHttpAutoProxySvc"; try { Set-ItemProperty $regPath -Name 'Start' -Value 3 -Force -EA Stop; "Registry OK: Start=$\(\( Get-ItemProperty $regPath -Name Start\).Start\)" } catch { "Registry failed: $_"; "Trying via reg.exe..."; reg add "HKLM\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\WinHttpAutoProxySvc" /v Start /t REG_DWORD /d 3 /f })

PowerShell($paramPath = "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\lfsvc\\Parameters"; if \(Test-Path $paramPath\) { $dll = \(Get-ItemProperty $paramPath -Name ServiceDll -EA SilentlyContinue\).ServiceDll; "ServiceDll: $dll"; if \($dll\) { "Exists: $\(Test-Path $dll\)" } } else { "No Parameters key - checking subkeys..."; Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\lfsvc" -Recurse -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $props = Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -EA SilentlyContinue; if \($props.ServiceDll\) { "$\($_.PSChildName\): ServiceDll=$\($props.ServiceDll\)" } } })
PowerShell($acl = Get-Acl "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\mpssvc"; $acl.Access | Format-Table IdentityReference, RegistryRights, AccessControlType -AutoSize)
PowerShell($acl = Get-Acl "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\mpssvc"; $acl.Access | Select-Object IdentityReference, RegistryRights, AccessControlType)

PowerShell($utf8bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $true; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\ServiceLists.ps1", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\ServiceLists.ps1", $content, $utf8bom\); $errors = $null; $null = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\("C:\\Users\\Kazuma\\Desktop\\Kazuma_Optimizer\\Scripts\\ServiceLists.ps1", [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\); if \($errors.Count -eq 0\) { "OK — no errors" } else { $errors | ForEach-Object { "Line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\): $\($_.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($services = @\('DPS', 'SensorService', 'SensorDataService', 'SensrSvc', 'iphlpsvc', 'DusmSvc', 'NcbService', 'WlanSvc', 'W32Time', 'RmSvc', 'WpnService', 'AppXSvc'\); foreach \($name in $services\) { $regPath = "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\$name"; $current = \(Get-ItemProperty $regPath -Name Start -EA SilentlyContinue\).Start; if \($null -ne $current\) { Set-ItemProperty $regPath -Name Start -Value 3 -Force; $new = \(Get-ItemProperty $regPath -Name Start\).Start; $label = if \($new -eq 3\) { "OK -> Ручн" } else { "FAILED" }; "$\($name.PadRight\(25\)\) было=$current -> $label" } else { "$\($name.PadRight\(25\)\) [не найдена]" } })
PowerShell(sc.exe config DPS start= demand; $val = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\DPS" -Name Start -EA SilentlyContinue\).Start; "DPS Start=$val")
